results.name: Defi Foundry
results.bio: 80% of Web3 Projects Fails. We build the ones that don't.
results.text:
The alternatives nobody talks about.

Before hiring expensive MMs, consider:

Protocol-owned liquidity: Use treasury funds to LP in your own pools. You capture fees instead of paying someone else.

Community liquidity programs: Reward long-term LPs who are actually aligned with your project success.

Strategic LP partnerships: Get other protocols or DAOs to provide liquidity as part of strategic alliances.

These often work better than mercenary MMs.

results.text:
PM hiring surge hits 3-year high 📊

Tech companies are posting 7,300+ open Product Manager roles globally - the highest since 2022. That's 75% above 2023 lows and up 20% just this year.

This mirrors what we're seeing in crypto infrastructure roles. As digital asset adoption accelerates, demand for technical talent follows institutional money flows.

The correlation between PM hiring spikes and market expansion phases is striking ⚡

#Markets #CryptoNews #DigitalAssets
